name: @normacore/station-app
description: Desktop Electron wrapper for NormaCore station-viewer

scripts.start: yarn build:viewer && yarn build:station && tsc && electron . --load-dist
scripts.package: yarn build:viewer && yarn build:station && yarn build && electron-builder --config electron-builder.yml
scripts.package:mac: yarn build:viewer && yarn build:station && yarn build && electron-builder --mac --config electron-builder.yml
